howItWorks.intro: This class size impact calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Student-Teacher Ratio
rules.explanation: Simple division of total students by number of teachers.

howItWorks.outro: Educational costs and financial aid vary by institution. Contact schools directly for current figures.

faq.q: What is the ideal class size?
faq.a: Research suggests 15-18 students per teacher provides optimal outcomes.
Yes, each aide effectively reduces the ratio, though not as much as a full teacher.
